Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.esd

Packages that use neqsim.process.safety.esd
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.esd
Emergency shutdown dynamic testing and evidence package helpers.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.esd used by neqsim.process.safety.esd
    Class
    Description
    EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion
    Acceptance criterion for an emergency shutdown dynamic test.
    EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion.CriterionType
    Types of acceptance checks supported by the ESD test runner.
    EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion.Result
    Result from evaluating one ESD acceptance criterion.
    EmergencyShutdownTestPlan
    Configuration for one emergency shutdown dynamic test.
    EmergencyShutdownTestPlan.Builder
    Builder for EmergencyShutdownTestPlan.
    EmergencyShutdownTestResult
    Structured report from an emergency shutdown dynamic test.
    EmergencyShutdownTestResult.FieldComparison
    Comparison between a field-data value and the final model value.
    EmergencyShutdownTestResult.SignalSample
    One time-series sample of monitored ESD signals.
    EmergencyShutdownTestResult.SignalStats
    Monitored signal statistics over the ESD transient.
    EmergencyShutdownTestResult.Verdict
    Overall verdict for the ESD dynamic test.
